name: rawal-hospital
description: Rawal Hospital - Complete Hospital Management System

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && npm run lint
scripts.test: cd backend && npm run test && cd ../frontend && npm run test
scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd .. && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
